/Users/s19447/Desktop/total-piper/piper/tools/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++             -s WASM=1             -s MODULARIZE=1             -s EXPORT_ES6=1             -s EXPORT_NAME='MeCabFullModule'             -s INITIAL_MEMORY=256MB             -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1             -s MAXIMUM_MEMORY=512MB             -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free']             -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','FS']             -s FORCE_FILESYSTEM=1             -s ENVIRONMENT=web             --bind             --preload-file /Users/s19447/Desktop/total-piper/piper/src/wasm/mecab/build_full/../dict/naist-jdic@/dict             -O3          @CMakeFiles/mecab_wasm_full.dir/objects1.rsp -o mecab_wasm_full.js
